nodes.name: ⏰ Daily Internal Link Scan (2 AM)
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 2 AM. Scans all published posts for internal linking opportunities. Also triggerable via webhook after a new post is created by WF09A.

nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Trigger After New Post
nodes.notes: Called by WF09A immediately after a new blog post is published. Receives post_id of the new post. Triggers an immediate link scan instead of waiting for the daily schedule.

nodes.name: 📥 Fetch All Published Posts
nodes.notes: Fetches all published blog posts from WordPress REST API. Gets content for keyword analysis. With 100 posts max per page — add pagination logic if blog grows beyond 100 posts.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Build Post Index + Extract Keywords
nodes.notes: Strips HTML, extracts title keywords and keyphrases, counts existing internal links per post. This index is passed to the AI for intelligent link matching.

values.content: You are an expert SEO specialist focused on internal linking strategy. You analyze blog post indexes and identify the best internal linking opportunities to improve SEO, reduce bounce rate, and build topical authority. You understand that good internal links: (1) use descriptive anchor text containing keywords, (2) connect topically related content, (3) flow naturally within the prose, (4) avoid over-linking (max 3-5 internal links per 1000 words). You never suggest linking a post to itself. Respond in valid JSON only.

=Analyze this blog post index and identify internal linking opportunities.

Total posts: {{$json.total_posts}}

Post Index (id, title, url, keyphrases, existing_links_count):
{{$json.post_index.map(p => `ID:${p.id} | "${p.title}" | ${p.url} | keyphrases: ${p.keyphrases.slice(0,5).join(', ')} | existing_internal_links: ${p.existing_internal_links.length}`).join('\n')}}

For each post that has fewer than 3 internal links, identify the best linking opportunities FROM other posts TO this post.

Rules:
- Only suggest links between genuinely related content
- Anchor text must be natural — a phrase already in the source post's content
- Never suggest linking a post to itself
- Prioritize: newer posts linking to older posts (passes authority to established content)
- Max 2 link suggestions per post pair
- Confidence: high (keyword exact match in content), medium (topically related), low (tangential)
- Only return high and medium confidence suggestions

Respond ONLY with this JSON:
{
  "link_suggestions": [
    {
      "source_post_id": 123,
      "source_post_title": "Post that should contain the link",
      "target_post_id": 456,
      "target_post_title": "Post being linked to",
      "target_post_url": "https://clearstackstudio.com/blog/slug",
      "suggested_anchor_text": "exact phrase to hyperlink in source post",
      "placement_hint": "Brief description of where in the source post this link should appear",
      "seo_reason": "Why this link helps SEO",
      "confidence": "high | medium",
      "auto_insert": true
    }
  ],
  "posts_needing_links": ["list of post titles with fewer than 3 internal links"],
  "summary": "Brief analysis of the internal linking health of this blog"
}

nodes.name: 🧠 mistral — Analyze + Find Link Opportunities
nodes.notes: mistral at low temp (0.3) for consistent, analytical output. Identifies genuine linking opportunities based on keyword overlap and topical relevance. Auto-insert flag = true for high confidence only.

nodes.name: 📥 Fetch Source Post Content
nodes.notes: Fetches the full content of the post that will receive the new internal link.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Inject Link Into Content
nodes.notes: Finds the anchor text phrase in the post content and wraps it with an anchor tag. Skips if: link already exists, or anchor text not found in content. Only touches the FIRST occurrence.

nodes.name: ✏️ Update Post With New Link
nodes.notes: Updates the WordPress post via REST API with the new internal link injected. Only updates content field — no other post data is touched.

nodes.name: 📊 Log Links Needing Review
nodes.notes: Medium-confidence suggestions land here. Open Internal_Links_Log tab, review each row, set YOUR_ACTION to APPROVE or SKIP. A future polling workflow can auto-insert approved ones.

value.Status: ={{ `Total posts: ${$('⚙️ Parse + Split Suggestions').first().json.auto_insert_count + $('⚙️ Parse + Split Suggestions').first().json.review_count} suggestions | Auto-inserted: ${$('⚙️ Parse + Split Suggestions').first().json.auto_insert_count} | Needs review: ${$('⚙️ Parse + Split Suggestions').first().json.review_count}` }}

meta.description: Workflow 10A: Internal Linking Agent. Daily scan of all WordPress posts. mistral identifies genuine linking opportunities based on keyword overlap and topical relevance. High-confidence links auto-inserted via WP REST API. Medium-confidence suggestions logged to Internal_Links_Log sheet for your review. Triggered by schedule (2 AM daily) or webhook (immediately after new post from WF09A).
